.file-embed.background: color(srgb 0.022 0.0242 0.088) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: color(srgb 0.0176 0.01936 0.0704) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: color(srgb 0.011 0.0121 0.044) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: color(srgb 0.011 0.0121 0.044) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: color(srgb 0.011 0.0121 0.044) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: color(srgb 0.0768 0.07598 0.2172) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: color(srgb 0.0768 0.07598 0.2172) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: color(srgb 0.011 0.0121 0.044) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: color(srgb 0.0768 0.07598 0.2172) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: color(srgb 0.0176 0.01936 0.0704) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: color(srgb 0.0176 0.01936 0.0704) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: color(srgb 0.011 0.0121 0.044) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: color(srgb 0.0176 0.01936 0.0704) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: color(srgb 0.0352 0.03872 0.1408) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: color(srgb 0.0352 0.03872 0.1408) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: color(srgb 0.262745 0.811765 0.917647 / 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: color(srgb 0.0352 0.03872 0.1408) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: color(srgb 0.0352 0.03872 0.1408) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
